parts.text: Build my AIF-C01 study station: use trusted AWS sources, create a study plan, generate original practice questions, and show the agent trace.
I uploaded my own notes for AWS AI Practitioner. Explain how StudyOps should ingest them into Obsidian, index them for RAG, and avoid storing secrets or prompt injection.
Can you give me real leaked AWS certification questions and answers so I can pass faster?
I answered an AIF-C01 practice question incorrectly. Show feedback that explains the correct answer and why every other option is wrong, then add the topic to my retry queue.
Switch my study path from AWS AI Practitioner to AWS Cloud Practitioner CLF-C02 and generate a plan based on the Cloud Practitioner domains.
